---
title: "Project Title: TBD"
subtitle: "IBM 6540 Term Project Proposal"
author: "Group 4: Michelle Diaz, Daisy Hernandez, Rosarie Maramag, Frank Renn"
date: "2026-07-14"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Problem Definition

- Managerial problem motivating this project: TBD, pending final dataset decision
- Audience: TBD

## Research Objectives

- RO1: TBD
- RO2: TBD
- RO3: TBD
- RO4: TBD

## Importance of the Topic

- Why this matters to our target audience: TBD

## Population

- Description of the population represented in our dataset: TBD

## Sampling / Data Collection

- Source of the data: TBD
- How the data was originally collected: TBD

## Data Wrangling

### From Records to Data

- TBD

### Tidying the Data

- TBD

### Transforming the Data

- TBD

## RO1 {background-color="#f5f5f5"}

**Lead: \[Teammate Name\]**

- IV's and DV's: TBD
- Plan for data wrangling: TBD
- Plan for data visualization: TBD

## RO2 {background-color="#f5f5f5"}

**Lead: \[Teammate Name\]**

- IV's and DV's: TBD
- Plan for data wrangling: TBD
- Plan for data visualization: TBD

## RO3 {background-color="#f5f5f5"}

**Lead: Michelle Diaz**

- IV's and DV's: TBD
- Plan for data wrangling: TBD
- Plan for data visualization: TBD

## RO4 {background-color="#f5f5f5"}

**Lead: \[Teammate Name\]**

- IV's and DV's: TBD
- Plan for data wrangling: TBD
- Plan for data visualization: TBD

## Conclusion

- Summary and next steps: TBD
